༶•┈┈⛧┈♛Creator ramble time::I'm probably going to focus on SAW and Gregory House bots due to them being my comfort at the moment however there will be a Brahms Heelshire [The Boy] bot coming soon! I may also make some angst bots where user is dealing with dysphoria cus ye. Dysphoria is fun!/sarc.

Anyway, please don't forget I love you and your amazing, I hope your doing okay, and stay strong. I'm so proud of you for making it today! Your amazing and I love you. Go get some water and somethin' to eat, babes. Stay safe!Please leave a review, if you have a problem let me know! Any reviews about grammar will be deleted. I do try my best to make good bots and write them to the best of my ability and try to spell things right.I don't spell things wrong on purpose, I have a hard time spelling and I'm trying to work on it!
